TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_miedap, title = miedap, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/miedap} }

S.FORM: (kamu nu hulam:е№«еҝҷ) miedap kaku ci Taymuan milangec. жҲ‘е№« Taymu еүІзЁ».
S.PHON: (kamu nu Д§ur~Йҫam:**) miЙҷdap kaku КҰi tajmuan mir~ЙҫaЕӢЙҷКҰ. ** tajmu **.

S.PHON: (kamu nu Д§ur~Йҫam:**) miЙҷdap kaku КҰi tajmuan mir~ЙҫaЕӢЙҷКҰ. ** tajmu **.
